meta_title: Revolutionize Classroom Insights with AI Behavioral Assessment
meta_description: Discover BehaviorIQ™, the AI behavioral assessment for teachers that provides actionable insights for every child in your classroom.

hero.headline: Transform Your Teaching with AI Insights
hero.subheadline: Unlock the potential of every student through personalized, AI-driven behavioral assessments designed for teachers.
hero.supporting_text: Join thousands of educators leveraging AI to enhance classroom dynamics and student success.

definition_section.heading: What is AI Behavioral Assessment?
paragraphs: AI behavioral assessment uses advanced algorithms to analyze student behavior, providing insights that help teachers tailor their approach.
BehaviorIQ™ empowers educators with research-backed data, enabling them to support each child's unique needs effectively.

steps.title: Easy Setup
steps.description: Sign up and integrate with your existing systems in minutes.

steps.title: Conduct Assessments
steps.description: Use our intuitive platform to assess student behavior effortlessly.

steps.title: Receive Insights
steps.description: Get actionable reports that inform your teaching strategy instantly.

faq.question: Is my data secure with BehaviorIQ™?
faq.answer: Absolutely! We prioritize privacy and adhere to strict data protection protocols.

faq.question: How accurate are the assessments?
faq.answer: Our AI-driven assessments are backed by extensive research, ensuring high accuracy.

faq.question: Is BehaviorIQ™ clinically aligned?
faq.answer: Yes, our assessments are designed in collaboration with behavioral health experts.
